mapper.select: SELECT s.submission_no, p.pid, s.language, s.status, s.verdict, s.submit_time, s.finish_time, u.username FROM submission s LEFT JOIN problem p ON s.problem_id = p.id AND p.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN user_info u ON s.user_id = u.id AND u.is_del = 0 WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_del = 0 ORDER BY s.submit_time DESC, s.id DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM submission s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.submit_time >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND s.submit_time < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d')
